 {"id":"bd-0d5p","title":"Fix TestRunSync_Timeout failing on macOS","description":"The hooks timeout test fails because exec.CommandContext doesn't properly terminate child processes of shell scripts on macOS. The test creates a hook that runs 'sleep 60' with a 500ms timeout, but it waits the full 60 seconds.

Options to fix:
- Use SysProcAttr{Setpgid: true} to create process group and kill the group
- Skip test on darwin with build tag
- Use a different approach for timeout testing

Location: internal/hooks/hooks_test.go:220-253","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-16T20:52:51.771217-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T23:13:40.532688-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T17:23:55.678799-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-0fvq","title":"bd doctor should recommend bd prime migration for existing repos","description":"bd doctor should detect old beads integration patterns and recommend migrating to bd prime approach.

## Current behavior
- bd doctor checks if Claude hooks are installed globally
- Doesn't check project-level integration (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md)
- Doesn't recommend migration for repos using old patterns

## Desired behavior
bd doctor should detect and suggest:

1. **Old slash command pattern detected**
   - Check for /beads:* references in AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md
   - Suggest: These slash commands are deprecated, use bd prime hooks instead
   
2. **No agent documentation**
   - Check if AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md exists
   - Suggest: Run 'bd onboard' or 'bd setup claude' to document workflow
   
3. **Old MCP-only pattern**
   - Check for instructions to use MCP tools but no bd prime hooks
   - Suggest: Add bd prime hooks for better token efficiency

4. **Migration path**
   - Show: 'Run bd setup claude to add SessionStart/PreCompact hooks'
   - Show: 'Update AGENTS.md to reference bd prime instead of slash commands'

## Example output

⚠ Warning: Old beads integration detected in CLAUDE.md
  Found: /beads:* slash command references (deprecated)
  Recommend: Migrate to bd prime hooks for better token efficiency
  Fix: Run 'bd setup claude' and update CLAUDE.md

💡 Tip: bd prime + hooks reduces token usage by 80-99% vs slash commands
  MCP mode: ~50 tokens vs ~10.5k for full MCP scan
  CLI mode: ~1-2k tokens with automatic context recovery

## Benefits
- Helps existing repos adopt new best practices
- Clear migration path for users
- Better token efficiency messaging","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-11-12T03:20:25.567748-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-12T03:20:25.567748-08:00"}

 {"id":"bd-0vg","title":"Pinned issues: persistent context markers","description":"Add ability to pin issues so they remain visible and are excluded from work-finding commands. Pinned issues serve as persistent context markers (handoffs, architectural notes, recovery instructions) that should not be claimed as work items.

Use Cases:
1. Handoff messages - Pin session handoffs so new agents always see them
2. Architecture decisions - Pin ADRs or design notes for reference  
3. Recovery context - Pin amnesia-cure notes that help agents orient

Core commands: bd pin, bd unpin, bd list --pinned/--no-pinned","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-18T23:33:10.911092-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T11:30:28.989696-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T11:30:28.989696-08:00","close_reason":"All children complete - pinned issues feature fully implemented"}
 {"id":"bd-0w5","title":"Fix update-hooks verification in version-bump.yaml","description":"The update-hooks task verification command at version-bump.yaml:358 always succeeds due to '|| echo ...' fallback. Remove the fallback so verification actually fails when hooks aren't installed.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-17T22:23:06.55467-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T22:34:07.290409-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T22:34:07.290409-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-0zp7","title":"Add missing hook calls in mail reply and ack","description":"The mail commands are missing hook calls:

1. runMailReply (mail.go:525-672) creates a message but doesn't call hookRunner.Run(hooks.EventMessage, ...) after creating the reply in direct mode (around line 640)

2. runMailAck (mail.go:432-523) closes messages but doesn't call hookRunner.Run(hooks.EventClose, ...) after closing each message (around line 487 for daemon mode, 493 for direct mode)

This means GGT hooks won't fire for replies or message acknowledgments.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-16T20:52:53.069412-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T23:13:40.532054-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-17T17:22:59.368024-08:00"}
